channel.title: Coding on Daniel Pritchett's Homepage
channel.description: Recent content in Coding on Daniel Pritchett's Homepage

item.title: Stream Live Coding With Twitch
item.description:
Why Livestream?

Livestreaming seems primarily popular among gamers but there is a growing niche for programming-oriented livestreams. I’m more into programming than gaming at this point in my life, so that’s what I’m streaming. Returning readers will already know about my upcoming book for the Pragmatic Programmers publishing company on chatbots. The working title is Natural Language Chatbots: Create Responsive, Intuitive Interfaces in Ruby.
